Gaps: Coverage: Implement POST /api/v1/projects/{projectId}/documents/{documentId}/review exactly per the specified API contract.
Coverage: Persist AuditLog for every review evaluation outcome (success and failure), including before/after status, reason/comments, correlation id, and no-mutation failure outcome.
Coverage: Remove inferred external-provider request/response contracts and keep behavior within the documented unspecified external dependency contract.
Coverage: Add API contract tests that verify exact HTTP method and path for all 4 scoped endpoints.
Checklist: Add pagination to GET /api/v1/admin/templates with validated parameters and bounded query results.
Checklist: Enforce bounded template-list responses with server-side pagination and default/max page-size limits.
Coverage: Render documents, add supported footer version text, and compute checksumSha256 for the rendered output.
Coverage: Add header validation tests for required and optional headers exactly as specified per endpoint.
